statement: In every magma, Equation 1290 (`x = y * (((x * y) * y) * z)`) implies Equation 4513 (`x * (y * z) = (x * y) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0079
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x y) y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op x y) w)
